{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Seishen cloudship
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Daji]] and [[Meira]] are deposited onto the [[Seishen cloudship]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
